// <auto-generated />
// This file is auto-generated by Mutty.

#nullable enable

using System.Collections.Immutable;
using System.Linq;

namespace Mutty.Tests
{
    /// <summary>
    /// The mutable wrapper for the <see cref="ComplexData"/> record.
    /// </summary>
    public partial class MutableComplexData
    {
        private ComplexData _record;

        /// <summary>
        /// Initializes a new instance of the <see cref="MutableComplexData"/> class.
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="record">The record to wrap.</param>
        public MutableComplexData(ComplexData record)
        {
            _record = record;

            Name = _record.Name;
            NestedData = _record.NestedData.AsMutable();
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Builds a new instance of the <see cref="ComplexData"/> class.
        /// </summary>
        public ComplexData Build()
        {
            return _record with
            {
                Name = this.Name,
                NestedData = this.NestedData.ToImmutable(),
            };
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Performs an implicit conversion from <see cref="ComplexData"/> to <see cref="MutableComplexData"/>.
        /// </summary>
        public static implicit operator MutableComplexData(ComplexData record)
        {
            return new MutableComplexData(record);
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Performs an implicit conversion from <see cref="MutableComplexData"/> to <see cref="ComplexData"/>.
        /// </summary>
        public static implicit operator ComplexData(MutableComplexData mutable)
        {
            return mutable.Build();
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Gets or sets the Name.
        /// </summary>
        public string Name { get; set; }

        /// <summary>
        /// Gets or sets the ImmutableCollection NestedData.
        /// </summary>
        public List<MutableImmutableDictionary<string, int>> NestedData { get; set; }
    }
}
